description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push. The workflow has two jobs, Macos and Linux. The Macos job runs on macos-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.5, installs packages and Python modules, downloads and extracts dependencies, and compiles the project using meson and ninja. The Linux job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix strategy for different targets, installs dependencies, compiles the project, runs tests, and publishes coverage to Codecov.
